name: recursive-pipeline-resilience
description: Makes multi-step and recursive agent pipelines resilient to failures, concurrency explosions, and redundant external calls. TRIGGER when: building a pipeline that spawns recursive sub-tasks, agent pipeline fails mid-execution and loses all accumulated work, concurrent sub-tasks overwhelm external APIs or accumulate shared state unsafely, long-running agent tasks need checkpointing or resume capability.
author: Assaf Elovic
